---
title: "Projects"
aliases:
  - /building
  - /projects
  - /pages/building
toc: false
---

Things I built, shipped, or abandoned.

## [Sidekick]{.underline}

An open source Claude Cowork alternative built on top of OpenAI Codex CLI. [GitHub](https://github.com/kanpuriyanawab/sidekick) · [Demo](https://x.com/athleticKoder/status/1884588042644881697)

## [Nebula]{.underline}

An open source agentic browser built with Electron & Chromium from scratch. Build local apps [on the fly](https://x.com/kanpuriyanawab/status/1945081337742025166) right in your web browser. [GitHub](https://github.com/kanpuriyanawab/nebula)

## [SlideBookLM]{.underline}

Learn any concept via PPT, visuals only. Built for Nano Banana hackathon in 6 hours — a missing feature in NotebookLM. [Announcement](https://x.com/athleticKoder/status/1832430467133370471)

## [Figma Plugin for AI Image Editing]{.underline}

A Figma plugin that lets you edit images with just prompts, powered by Qwen's image-edit model on FAL. [Demo](https://x.com/athleticKoder/status/1823727976729903301)

## [AI Agents via Cmd+Space]{.underline}

A Raycast app to run AI agents — email, tweet, book meetings, search — all from Cmd+Space. Built with Composio and AI SDK. [Demo](https://x.com/athleticKoder/status/1825868030632595573)

## [Snapgenie]{.underline}

Turn product snaps into professional photographs. My first [SaaS](https://snapgenie.pro).
